title: Country House School – Breaking News!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are thrilled to announce...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We are thrilled to announce that Country House School, established in 2014, renowned for its exceptional pre-school, primary school, indoor pool and indoor trampoline park at HopHouse, has expanded its footprint with the acquisition of a second property!

This new space will accommodate the growing demand for our high school and the annual integration of higher grades.

This expansion marks a significant milestone in our journey, and we can't wait to share this new chapter with you.


> If you're interested in securing a spot for your child in this exceptional school, inquire now to learn more about our academic programmes, facilities, and CHS community.


Join us in shaping the future of education and empowering the next generation of leaders!

Contact us today to schedule a tour and discover why Country House School is the perfect fit for your child's educational journey.

PHOTO GALLERY: Country House expands for growth

Accommodating students /children from four months old.

Contact us:

- Email us
- Address: 7 Witfontein Road, Heather Park, George
- Call us: 072 101 8282
- Facebook post
- Website

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
